title: KeyMapping
description: A named set of keyboard-to-note bindings for the web bass instrument.

name.description: Human-readable name shown in the Presets tab.

description.description: Optional longer description of the layout.

mappings.description: Keys are KeyboardEvent.key values; values are note bindings.

channel.description: MIDI channel; maps to a string voice (1=E 2=A 3=D 4=G).

label.description: Display label shown in the Control Mapping tab, e.g. 'E1' or 'fret 0'.
